description: Session lifecycle hooks: flag unconfirmed product assumptions on stop.

hooks.prompt: Before finishing: did you make assumptions about user-facing behavior, edge cases, or UX tradeoffs that weren't explicitly covered in the spec or issue description? If yes, and the assumption meaningfully affects the user experience, briefly flag it: 'I assumed [X] for [reason] — you may want to /ask-pm to confirm with the PM.' One sentence max. If no meaningful product assumptions were made, say nothing.
